_overview.description: Restspace services are modular components that handle HTTP requests. Each service is configured with a source URL, base path, access control, and optional adapter.

configuration.name: Human-readable service name
configuration.basePath: URL path where service is mounted

access.readRoles: Comma-separated roles for read access (U, E, A, or *)

configuration.prePipeline: Pipeline to run before service handler
configuration.postPipeline: Pipeline to run after service handler

data.name: Data Service
data.description: Read/write generic data from data stores by key. The fundamental storage service.

config.uploadBaseUrl: URL to file store for handling attachments

dataset.name: Dataset Service
dataset.description: Read/write data with JSON Schema validation. Enforces data structure.

file.name: File Service
file.description: Get/PUT files with optional path tree substitution and directory handling.

config.parentIfMissing: Serve parent file if requested file missing
config.defaultResource: File to serve when directory requested

static-site.name: Static Site Service
static-site.description: Host a static site with SPA routing support. Rewrites paths for single-page apps.

template.name: Template Service
template.description: Store templates and fill them with POST request data. Supports multiple template engines.

usage.POST /templates/welcome.html: Render template with posted JSON data

query.name: Query Service
query.description: Store queries and run them parametrized by POST body. Supports complex database queries.

usage.POST /queries/active-users: Execute query with parameters from POST body

pipeline.name: Pipeline Service
pipeline.description: Chain multiple service calls with data transformation between them.

pipeline-store.name: Pipeline Store Service
pipeline-store.description: Store pipeline specifications and run them. Combines persistence with execution.

usage.POST /pipelines/my-workflow: Execute the stored pipeline with input data

auth.name: Auth Service
auth.description: JWT authentication with role-based access control. Issues and validates tokens.

config.userUrlPattern: URL pattern to fetch user data
config.jwtUserProps: Extra user properties to embed in JWT

endpoints.POST /auth/login: Authenticate with email/password, returns JWT cookie

account.name: Account Service
account.description: Password reset and email verification flows.

email.name: Email Service
email.description: Send emails with optional attachments via SMTP.

timer.name: Timer Service
timer.description: Trigger a URL at regular intervals. Useful for scheduled tasks.

config.triggerUrl: URL to POST to every interval
config.repeatDuration: ISO 8601 duration between triggers (e.g., PT1H for hourly)

timer-store.name: Timer Store Service
timer-store.description: Store timer specifications and manage multiple timers.

webhooks.name: Webhooks Service
webhooks.description: Lightweight webhook registry and dispatcher with retry support.

usage.POST /webhooks/user-created: Trigger the webhook with event data

proxy.name: Proxy Service
proxy.description: Forward requests with server-defined auth or URLs. Useful for API integration.

sse.name: Server-Side Events Service
sse.description: Manage SSE connections to multiple clients for real-time updates.

services.name: Services Service
services.description: Discovery endpoint for configured services. Provides service catalogue and metadata.

temporary-access.name: Temporary Access Service
temporary-access.description: Generate tokens for temporary resource access with elevated roles.

user-filter.name: User Filter Service
user-filter.description: Filter service that manages passwords and restricts operations to specific users.
